scripts.build: pnpm --filter @susu-ui/tokens build && pnpm --filter @susu-ui/theme build && pnpm --filter @susu-ui/vue build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @susu-ui/tokens build && pnpm --filter @susu-ui/theme build && pnpm --filter @susu-ui/vue build && pnpm --filter playground typecheck
